description: Style Noteyork perfumes are known for its sophisticated fragrances and it's value for money. No ensemble is complete without the right fragrance and york has a flavor for every season. Emit the aura of a diva without burning a hole in your pocket. Encased in a delectable flacon, this perfume is a wardrobe essential this summer. Product DetailsInspired from the Archies comics, Betty for women by York comes in a glass flacon. Comes with a pair of heart shaped earrings that dangle from a fish hook claspCautionDo not spray near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying on eyesSize100 ml
